title: A Mean In Our Means
content:
Though frankincense the deities require,
    We must not give all to the hallow'd fire.
    Such be our gifts, and such be our expense,
    As for ourselves to leave some frankincense.
meaning:
"A Mean In Our Means" is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
